Quotation marks have many uses, one of which is to highlight a specific term within a sentence. This is used in this very article, when discussing the multiple definitions of the term "Aves" (all four definitions: Avemetatarsalia, Avifilopluma, Avialae, and Neornithes are indeed clades).
